# First Plan

This plan implements [[ADR-0001]] and tracks against [[WORK-ITEM-0001]].

Also references a non-existent [[ADR-9999]] for testing.

graph LR

Inline configuration like `--ac-font-mono` should render as a monospace pill.

|---|---|
| `--ac-font-mono` | applied via `code` spans |

const x = 1
